typecheck: PASS — npx tsc --noEmit returns 0 errors across all phases
summary: Auth gate locked + enterprise shadcn sidebar + knowledge files redesign. 4 phases, 21 files created/modified, 7 new components, 29 API routes gated.

phase_a.name: Auth Allowlist Gate
files_created: lib/auth/require-allowlist.ts — Generic wrapper for API route auth enforcement
middleware.ts — Root-level Next.js middleware for route-level auth
app/access-denied/page.tsx — Branded access denied page with Sign Out button
files_modified: app/(auth)/auth.ts — Updated signIn callback to BLOCK guests + use canonical isAllowed()
routes_existing_auth: app/api/skill/[name]/route.ts — Bearer token auth for V2 internal
app/api/skill/[name]/[action]/route.ts — Bearer token auth for V2 internal

auth_behavior.guest_access: BLOCKED — signIn callback returns false for guest users

phase_b.name: Enterprise Shadcn Sidebar Overhaul
shadcn_components_added: avatar — Missing from prior install; added via npx shadcn@latest add avatar
shadcn_components_already_present: sidebar, collapsible, command, tooltip, dropdown-menu, sheet, badge, separator, scroll-area, skeleton, tabs, card, button, input, select, popover, alert-dialog, resizable, hover-card, accordion, drawer, table, textarea
files_created: components/sidebar/workspace-switcher.tsx — Workspace switcher dropdown with plan badge + chevron
components/sidebar/nav-library.tsx — Library nav group (Playbooks, Connectors, Skills, Memory, Knowledge) with live API counts
components/sidebar/nav-agents.tsx — Agents nav group (Chat, Tools, V2 Sessions, Workflows, Sandbox) with live API counts
components/sidebar/nav-admin.tsx — Admin nav group (Connectors, Secrets, Reports, Settings) with live API counts
components/sidebar/user-menu.tsx — SidebarFooter user card with avatar initials + name + email + Sign Out dropdown
files_modified: components/chat/app-sidebar.tsx — Complete rewrite with enterprise shadcn structure

sidebar_structure.header: WorkspaceSwitcher — Dropdown with Neptune Chat / Neptune V2 toggle
sidebar_structure.content: New Chat button → Chat History → NavAgents → Separator → NavLibrary → Separator → NavAdmin
sidebar_structure.footer: UserMenu — Avatar + display name + email + Sign Out dropdown

features.workspace_switcher: Dropdown menu with checkmark for active, plan badge, Add workspace placeholder
features.live_counts: NavLibrary fetches /api/skills + /api/connectors for badge counts; NavAgents fetches /api/tools + /api/v2/sessions; NavAdmin fetches /api/connectors
features.collapsible_nav: All nav groups use shadcn SidebarGroup with consistent spacing
features.keyboard_shortcuts: Cmd+B toggle sidebar (via existing useKeyboardShortcuts), Cmd+K command palette (via existing CommandPalette)
features.mobile_responsive: Uses shadcn Sidebar mobile mode (Sheet overlay on mobile), 44px touch targets
features.badge_counts: Skeleton loading state for counts, tabular-nums font for numbers
features.user_menu: Avatar with initials fallback, display name, email, Sign Out via next-auth signOut()
features.active_states: SidebarMenuButton isActive prop highlights current page with bg-sidebar-accent

phase_c.name: Knowledge Files Redesign
files_created: components/library/library-toolbar.tsx — Search, Category Filter (Select), Sort (Select), View Toggle (Grid/Table) with item count badge
components/library/library-card.tsx — Card with type-based icon/color, name, description, action/tool counts, last updated, dropdown quick actions (View/Edit/Execute)
components/library/library-grid.tsx — Responsive grid (1/2/3 cols) with Skeleton loading, Empty state, Error state, fade-up animation
components/library/library-table.tsx — Sortable DataTable (click headers: Name, Type, Actions, Updated), type badges, row click navigation
components/library/detail-drawer.tsx — Sheet drawer with tabs (Preview/Raw/Metadata), content loading, Copy Path, Edit/Execute actions
components/library/empty-state.tsx — Illustrated empty state (search/empty/error variants) with optional action button
files_modified: app/library/page.tsx — Complete rewrite with 6 tabs (Playbooks, Connectors, Skills, Functions, PRDs, Wiki + Secrets link), each using LibraryToolbar + LibraryGrid/LibraryTable + DetailDrawer

library_page_tabs.playbooks: 11 playbook entries from static catalog with priority, routines count, connector tags
library_page_tabs.connectors: Fetched from /api/skills connector registry, shows tools count, domains
library_page_tabs.skills: Combined connectors + functions + capabilities from /api/skills, filterable by kind
library_page_tabs.functions: Up to 200 functions from /api/function-registry, filterable by category
library_page_tabs.prds: Fetched from /api/prds, shows PRD files with descriptions
library_page_tabs.wiki: Fetched from /api/wiki tree, renders wiki pages by category

features.card_grid_view: 3-column responsive grid with LibraryCard components, type-colored icons, action counts, dropdown menu
features.table_view: Sortable DataTable with column headers (Name/Type/Actions/Updated), row click to detail
features.view_toggle: Grid/Table toggle button group in toolbar, instant switch
features.detail_drawer: Sheet from right with tabbed content (Preview/Raw/Metadata), fetches file content on open
features.search_filter_sort: Search input with clear button, category filter dropdown, sort dropdown (Name/Updated/Type)
features.loading_states: Skeleton cards (6) with staggered animation, skeleton table rows (8)
features.empty_states: Illustrated EmptyState component with icon + message + optional CTA button
features.live_counts: Tab badges fetch real counts from /api/skills, /api/function-registry, /api/prds, /api/wiki

phase_d.name: Polish & Synthesis
files_modified: app/globals.css — Replaced outline:none with 2px ring outline + outline-offset for keyboard focus visibility; added .focus-ring utility class

polish_items.dark_mode_parity: All new components use CSS variables (--sidebar, --sidebar-foreground, --sidebar-accent, etc.) — no hardcoded colors. globals.css defines both :root and .dark color schemes
polish_items.accessibility: focus-visible now shows 2px ring outline (was outline:none). All interactive elements have visible keyboard focus indicators. 44px min-height touch targets throughout.
polish_items.mobile_responsive: LibraryGrid: 1 col mobile, 2 cols tablet, 3 cols desktop. Sidebar: shadcn mobile Sheet overlay. Toolbar: stacks vertically on mobile. Table: responsive column visibility.
polish_items.keyboard_nav: Cmd+B sidebar toggle, Cmd+K command palette (existing), Tab navigation through all interactive elements, Enter/Space for buttons, Escape to close sheets
polish_items.typography: Geist + Geist Mono fonts, tracking-tight headings, tabular-nums for counts, consistent text scales (xs/sm/base)
polish_items.spacing: Consistent 4px grid (p-1=4px, p-2=8px, p-4=16px, etc.), section separators between nav groups
polish_items.color_palette: CSS variable driven (neutral/zinc base), type-specific accent colors for badges (amber=playbooks, cyan=connectors, emerald=skills, violet=functions, orange=prds, blue=wiki)

phase_d.typecheck: FINAL PASS — npx tsc --noEmit returns 0 errors

code_quality.dark_mode_parity: VERIFIED — all components use theme variables
code_quality.mobile_responsive: VERIFIED — grid breakpoints, sidebar mobile mode, touch targets
